code: export class UserLiveFeedParser{constructor(){this._data={username:'',figure:'',message:''};}flush(){this._data={username:'',figure:'',message:''};return true;}parse(wrapper){try{const username=wrapper.readString();const figure=wrapper.readString();const message=wrapper.readString();this._data={username,figure,message};return true;}catch(e){return false;}}get data(){return this._data;}}
